# Pull Request

## Type of Change
- [ ] New HTML example or exercise
- [ ] Fix a bug or broken code

- [ ] Update documentation or README

## Checklist
- [ ] My HTML is valid and renders correctly in the browser
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] My code follows the style of the existing examples in the repo
- [ ] I have not included any sensitive or personal information
